cenas.dalle_prompt: A trainer is holding a very exciting toy or treat, but not giving it to the dog. The dog is getting audibly frustrated, letting out a small whine or bark. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The camera is focused on the dog's face, capturing its building excitement and the moment it makes a sound.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The instant the dog barks, the trainer says "Sim!" and gives the toy/treat. The command "Fala!" is introduced. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A sound wave graphic appears from the dog's mouth as it barks, followed by the immediate reward, creating a clear link.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Now, the trainer says "Fala!" and the dog barks on command. Jackpot reward. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A clear shot of the dog barking on the verbal cue. A "Jackpot!" animation celebrates the success.

cenas.dalle_prompt: The trainer teaches the "Silêncio" command by rewarding the dog for being quiet after a bark. A split screen shows the "Fala!" and "Silêncio" commands in action. 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: The split screen clearly demonstrates the on/off nature of the two commands, showing control.

cenas.dalle_prompt: Final shot of a dog "singing" along with its owner who is playing a guitar. A fun, communicative moment. Text overlay: "Fale! Sua Voz é Música". 8k quality.
cenas.grok_movement: A heartwarming and humorous shot of the dog and owner duet. The text appears in a fun, musical font.
